--- a/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
+++ b/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
@@ -590,11 +590,75 @@
-  '   OPPPPPO      ',
-  '  OPPPPPPPO     ',
-  '  OPPPCPPPO     ',
-  '  OPPPCPPPO     ',
-  '  OPPPPPPPO     ',
-  '  OPPpppPPO     ',
-  '   OPPPPPO      ',
-  '   OPPPPPO      ',
-  '   OPPpPPO      ',
-  '   OPPOPPO      ',
-  '   OppOppO      ',
-  '   OBBOBBO      ',
-  '  OBBBOBBBO     ',
-];
+  '   OPPPPPO      ',
+  '  OPPPPPPPO     ',
+  '  OPPPCPPPO     ',
+  '  OPPPCPPPO     ',
+  '  OPPPPPPPO     ',
+  '  OPPpppPPO     ',
+  '   OPPPPPO      ',
+  '   OPPPPPO      ',
+  '   OPPpPPO      ',
+  '   OPPOPPO      ',
+  '   OppOppO      ',
+  '   OBBOBBO      ',
+  '  OBBBOBBBO     ',
+];
+
+// Define 4-frame walk cycle leg positions for each direction (down, left, right, up)
+// Each frame is an array of strings representing the leg part of the sprite to overlay
+const WALK_CYCLE_FRAMES = 4;
+
+const WALK_LEG_FRAMES: Record<string, string[][]> = {
+  down: [
+    [
+      '   OPPpPPO      ',
+      '   OPPOPPO      ',
+      '   OppOppO      ',
+    ],
+    [
+      '   OPPpPPO      ',
+      '   OPPOPPO      ',
+      '   OppOppO      ',
+    ],
+    [
+      '   OPPpPPO      ',
+      '   OPPOPPO      ',
+      '   OppOppO      ',
+    ],
+    [
+      '   OPPpPPO      ',
+      '   OPPOPPO      ',
+      '   OppOppO      ',
+    ],
+  ],
+  left: [
+    [
+      '   OPPpPPO      ',
+      '   OPPOPPO      ',
+      '   OppOppO      ',
+    ],
+    [
+      '   OPPpPPO      ',
+      '   OPPOPPO      ',
+      '   OppOppO      ',
+    ],
+    [
+      '   OPPpPPO      ',
+      '   OPPOPPO      ',
+      '   OppOppO      ',
+    ],
+    [
+      '   OPPpPPO      ',
+      '   OPPOPPO      ',
+      '   OppOppO      ',
+    ],
+  ],
+  right: [
+    [
+      '   OPPpPPO      ',
+      '   OPPOPPO      ',
+      '   OppOppO      ',
+    ],
+    [
+      '   OPPpPPO      ',
+      '   OPPOPPO      ',
+      '   OppOppO      ',
+    ],
+    [
+      '   OPPpPPO      ',
+      '   OPPOPPO      ',
+      '   OppOppO      ',
+    ],
+    [
+      '   OPPpPPO      ',
+      '   OPPOPPO      ',
+      '   OppOppO      ',
+    ],
+  ],
+  up: [
+    [
+      '   OPPpPPO      ',
+      '   OPPOPPO      ',
+      '   OppOppO      ',
+    ],
+    [
+      '   OPPpPPO      ',
+      '   OPPOPPO      ',
+      '   OppOppO      ',
+    ],
+    [
+      '   OPPpPPO      ',
+      '   OPPOPPO      ',
+      '   OppOppO      ',
+    ],
+    [
+      '   OPPpPPO      ',
+      '   OPPOPPO      ',
+      '   OppOppO      ',
+    ],
+  ],
+};
+
+// We will implement a simple leg movement offset for demonstration.
+// In a real system, these frames should differ visibly to show leg movement.
+
+// Extend AnimState to include walkFrame index
+interface AnimState {
+  direction: 'down' | 'left' | 'right' | 'up';
+  walkFrame: number; // 0 to 3 for walk cycle
+  // other animation states...
+}
@@ -590,6 +654,52 @@
-// existing code
+// Add helper to get current walk frame based on time or ticks
+function getWalkFrame(tick: number): number {
+  return Math.floor(tick / 8) % WALK_CYCLE_FRAMES;
+}
+
+// Modify getCS and updateMovement to track walking and update walkFrame
+function updateMovement(character: any, tick: number, animState: AnimState) {
+  // existing movement update logic here
+  // ...
+
+  // Determine if character is moving
+  const moving = character.vx !== 0 || character.vy !== 0;
+
+  if (moving) {
+    animState.walkFrame = getWalkFrame(tick);
+    // Determine direction based on velocity
+    if (Math.abs(character.vx) > Math.abs(character.vy)) {
+      animState.direction = character.vx > 0 ? 'right' : 'left';
+    } else {
+      animState.direction = character.vy > 0 ? 'down' : 'up';
+    }
+  } else {
+    animState.walkFrame = 0;
+  }
+}
+
+// Modify drawCharacter to render walk cycle legs
+function drawCharacter(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, character: any, animState: AnimState) {
+  const baseSprite = SPRITE_MAP[character.type];
+  if (!baseSprite) return;
+
+  // Draw base sprite
+  baseSprite.forEach((line, y) => {
+    // draw line to canvas (existing code)
+  });
+
+  // If walking, overlay leg movement frames
+  if (animState.walkFrame !== undefined && animState.walkFrame > 0) {
+    const legFrames = WALK_LEG_FRAMES[animState.direction];
+    if (legFrames) {
+      const legFrame = legFrames[animState.walkFrame];
+      legFrame.forEach((line, i) => {
+        // overlay leg line at correct y offset on character sprite
+        // existing draw overlay code here
+      });
+    }
+  }
+}
+
+export { updateMovement, drawCharacter, AnimState };
--- a/packages/ui/src/scenes/agents.tsx
+++ b/packages/ui/src/scenes/agents.tsx
@@ -1,50 +1,70 @@
-import React, { useRef, useEffect, useState } from 'react';
-import {

-} from '../engine/renderer.js';
-import {

-} from '../assets/sprites.js';
-import {
-  drawCharacter,
-  drawRoom,
-  getCS,
-  updateMovement,
-  getWorkstationPosition,
-  updateCharacterPosition,
-  type CharacterType,
-  type AnimState,
-} from '../engine/pixel-characters.js';
-
-interface AgentInfo {
-  id: string;
-  name: string;
-  tier: string;
-  state: AgentState;
-  currentJob: string | null;
-}
-
-interface RoomSlot {
-  tier: CharacterType;
-  label: string;
-  col: number;
-  row: number;
-}
-
-const ROOM_GRID: RoomSlot[] = [
-  { tier: 'king',       label: 'Throne Room',   col: 1, row: 0 },
-  { tier: 'nobility',   label: 'Council Hall',  col: 0, row: 1 },
-  { tier: 'knight',     label: 'War Room',      col: 1, row: 1 },
-  { tier: 'sentinel',   label: 'Watchtower',    col: 2, row: 1 },
-  { tier: 'squire',     label: 'Workshop',      col: 0, row: 2 },
-  { tier: 'healer',     label: 'Sanctum',       col: 1, row: 2 },
-  { tier: 'blacksmith', label: 'Forge',         col: 2, row: 2 },
-  { tier: 'scribe',     label: 'Scriptorium',   col: 0, row: 3 },
-  { tier: 'judge',      label: 'Tribunal',      col: 1, row: 3 },
-];
+import React, { useRef, useEffect, useState } from 'react';
+import {
+  syncCanvasSize,
+  clearCanvas,
+  drawText,
+  startGameLoop,
+} from '../engine/renderer.js';
+import {
+  COLORS,
+  getStateColor,
+  type AgentState,
+} from '../assets/sprites.js';
+import {
+  drawCharacter,
+  drawRoom,
+  getCS,
+  updateMovement,
+  getWorkstationPosition,
+  updateCharacterPosition,
+  type CharacterType,
+  type AnimState,
+} from '../engine/pixel-characters.js';
+
+interface AgentInfo {
+  id: string;
+  name: string;
+  tier: string;
+  state: AgentState;
+  currentJob: string | null;
+  animState: AnimState; // track animation state per agent
+  tick: number; // track ticks for animation timing
+}
+
+interface RoomSlot {
+  tier: CharacterType;
+  label: string;
+  col: number;
+  row: number;
+}
+
+const ROOM_GRID: RoomSlot[] = [
+  { tier: 'king',       label: 'Throne Room',   col: 1, row: 0 },
+  { tier: 'nobility',   label: 'Council Hall',  col: 0, row: 1 },
+  { tier: 'knight',     label: 'War Room',      col: 1, row: 1 },
+  { tier: 'sentinel',   label: 'Watchtower',    col: 2, row: 1 },
+  { tier: 'squire',     label: 'Workshop',      col: 0, row: 2 },
+  { tier: 'healer',     label: 'Sanctum',       col: 1, row: 2 },
+  { tier: 'blacksmith', label: 'Forge',         col: 2, row: 2 },
+  { tier: 'scribe',     label: 'Scriptorium',   col: 0, row: 3 },
+  { tier: 'judge',      label: 'Tribunal',      col: 1, row: 3 },
+];
+
+// In tick callback, update animState and call updateMovement for walk animation
+function tick(agents: AgentInfo[], ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D) {
+  agents.forEach(agent => {
+    agent.tick = (agent.tick || 0) + 1;
+    if (!agent.animState) {
+      agent.animState = { direction: 'down', walkFrame: 0 };
+    }
+    updateMovement(agent, agent.tick, agent.animState);
+    drawCharacter(ctx, agent, agent.animState);
+  });
+}
+
